description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the library/node:9.11.1 Docker image and three stages: setup, build, and deploy. In the setup stage add an install job that runs `npm i` and stores the `node_modules` directory as an artifact. In the build stage add a lint job that runs `npm run lint` and a webPackBuild job that runs `npm run build` and saves the `dist` directory as an artifact. In the deploy stage add a pages job that copies `dist` to a `public` folder with `cp -r dist public`, publishes the `public/` directory as a Pages artifact, and only runs on the master branch.
